code.issue: Hardcoded production secrets (Stripe, Anthropic, DB password, Plaid) committed to source.
Logs password and SSN to stdout on every login attempt.
Email concatenated into SQL string — injection vector.
Uses MD5 for password hashing; no salt.
Returns SSN, full PAN, CVV, tax ID in API response with no authorization check.
User id concatenated into SQL string.
Full user profile including SSN logged.
AI chat responses delivered directly to customer with no human review or guardrails.
System prompt instructs the model to give concrete investment/tax/retirement advice.
SSN, balance, and card number sent in prompt to Anthropic API.
SSN/email forwarded to Segment, Mixpanel, and DoubleClick without consent check.
Card number and CVV written to localStorage and cookies on submit.
ssl:false on DB connection; no field-level encryption for PII columns.
writePII builds SQL via string concatenation.
CORS wide open (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *) with credentials; no CSP, HSTS, or X-Frame-Options.
Pinned to vulnerable versions of axios (0.21.0) and lodash (4.17.15).

policyVsCode.policy: PII must never be written to logs
policyVsCode.code: app/api/auth/login/route.ts logs password + SSN; app/api/users/[id]/route.ts logs full profile

policyVsCode.policy: All PII must be encrypted at rest (AES-256)
policyVsCode.code: lib/config.ts sets encryption:false; lib/db.ts uses ssl:false and stores PII in plaintext columns

policyVsCode.policy: Card numbers must not be stored in browser storage
policyVsCode.code: components/PaymentForm.tsx writes card+CVV to localStorage and cookies

policyVsCode.policy: PII sharing with third parties requires consent + DPA
policyVsCode.code: lib/analytics.ts forwards SSN/email to Segment, Mixpanel, DoubleClick unconditionally

policyVsCode.policy: Production secrets must not appear in source
policyVsCode.code: lib/config.ts contains live Stripe, Anthropic, Plaid, and DB credentials

policyVsCode.policy: Customer-facing AI output must pass human review or guardrails
policyVsCode.code: app/api/chat/route.ts streams raw model output straight to the customer

policyVsCode.policy: AI must not give personalized financial advice
policyVsCode.code: app/api/chat/route.ts system prompt explicitly tells the model to give investment/tax/retirement advice

policyVsCode.policy: SSNs/card numbers must not be sent to foundation-model APIs
policyVsCode.code: app/api/chat/route.ts injects SSN, balance, card into the prompt sent to Anthropic

policyVsCode.policy: AI endpoints must enforce rate limits and authentication
policyVsCode.code: app/api/chat/route.ts has no rate limiting; no auth check
Every db.query call concatenates user input into SQL
